seo.title: About Us | Quarterfold Printabilities
seo.description: One of India's largest print and publishing solutions companies, printing 25M+ books a year for publishers and education programmes across 25+ countries.

hero.title: About Us
hero.lede: One of India's largest print and publishing solutions companies, powering education across 25+ countries.

founder.quote: Our mission is simple. To be one of the top ten printing and educational content companies across the globe by 2030, powering publishers and education programmes in every market we serve.
founder.imageAlt: Founder and Managing Director of Quarterfold Printabilities

awards.eduExport: Education Export Company of the Year 2024

story.title: India's largest print and publishing solutions company.
story.para1: Quarterfold specialises in high-quality printing presses built for large-scale book production and print-on-demand, handling large-volume projects for private publishers and government, World Bank backed tenders.
story.para2: Our operations run across three state-of-the-art printing presses in Taloja, Navi Mumbai, and two large warehouses and fulfilment centres, spanning 250,000 sq ft of high-end web towers, sheet-fed machines and finishing lines.
story.imageAlt: Quarterfold printing facility in Taloja, Navi Mumbai

reach.body: Our presses and fulfilment centres sit in Vashi and Taloja, Navi Mumbai — the launch point for every book we ship to 25+ countries.

delivered.title: Books delivered to date
delivered.desc: Printed in India, read across 25+ countries.
